title: fork-session-and-agent-nav
description: Add session fork (menu 'f' + h2 fork CLI): copy claude session log to new session id, clone RuntimeConfig with new agent name (parent-forkN), no pod inheritance, resume in new daemon, switch attached terminal over. Add agent navigator (menu 'a'): full-screen list of running agents with arrow navigation, Enter switches the current terminal to that agent via a new daemon->client switch control frame; h2 attach becomes a reconnect loop.

comments.author: fond-birch
comments.text: Initial implementation done: session fork (menu f + h2 session fork CLI), agent navigator (menu a), daemon->client switch control frame with reconnect loop in doAttach. Unit tests in internal/session/fork_test.go, internal/cmd/fork_test.go, internal/session/client/menu_test.go. make check + full test suite pass. Awaiting review / user QA of live switching flow.

comments.author: fond-birch
comments.text: Follow-up per user feedback: navigator now lists stopped sessions (from session dirs) as 'Stopped' at the end instead of 'not responding'; Enter on a stopped session resumes it via shared session.ResumeSession (extracted from runResume) then switches; live list grouped by pod like h2 list (pods first, PodIndex order) with lone agents sorted by recent activity; attach client falls back to previous agent if a switch target is unreachable.

comments.author: fond-birch
comments.text: User confirmed: no age cutoff for the navigator's stopped section — it intentionally shows all stopped sessions (more inclusive than h2 list's default), with h2 session cleanup as the pruning mechanism. Feature complete on branch feature/fork-session-and-agent-nav; pending live QA of fork/switch/resume flows before merge.
